routing.fallback: Static table of coefficient tail exponents.
routing.why: Frequency weights give a direct finite model of weak derivative control for p=2.

routing.fallback: Pure SymPy identity and numeric norm ledger.
routing.why: The flat multiplier symbol is visible as a heatmap and its norm identity is exact.
The inverse Laplacian is most transparent as high-frequency damping.

routing.fallback: Ordered ledger with edge list checks.
routing.why: The proof is a dependency chain; a directed acyclic graph exposes what each estimate unlocks.

routing.fallback: CSV ladder and static Matplotlib plot.
routing.why: The iteration depends on p and q; Plotly makes the threshold crossing inspectable, with a PNG fallback.
